note: Fixed task suite over bench/corpus. 'expected' is a checkable string that must appear verbatim in the text each arm would place in the agent's context for the arm to score task_success. 'grep_keyword' is what a competent grep-and-read agent (B1) would grep for; 'eap_query' is what the agent would pass to eap_search (B2).
